meta.title: HSE Manufacturing — Machine-Guarding Assessment
meta.subtitle: Press line PL-3, machine-guarding survey
meta.author: HSE Manufacturing
meta.deid_notice: All personnel are referred to by role label. Identifiers were pseudonymised before drafting; the re-identification key is held separately and is not part of this document.

sections.text: This survey of press line PL-3 records machine-guarding findings against PUWER-equivalent requirements. One interlock defeat and one missing fixed guard are open high-risk findings.

rows.title: Interlock defeated on PL-3 power press
rows.description: The light-curtain interlock is bridged, allowing the platen to cycle with the guard open.

rows.title: Fixed guard missing on shaft drive
rows.description: Rotating-shaft fixed guard removed for maintenance and not refitted.

rows.title: Emergency-stop reach exceeds standard
rows.description: Operator e-stop is beyond the recommended reach envelope at the infeed station.

rows.control: Restore and tamper-seal the light-curtain interlock
Refit the fixed shaft guard before restart
Guard-integrity check added to the start-of-shift checklist

rows.action: Restore the PL-3 interlock and verify by competent person
Audit interlock integrity across all presses

sections.text: PL-3 must remain quarantined and locked out until the interlock is restored and proven.
